title: NoFun DnT
description: A datapack which removes enchantments from Dungeons and Taverns, works with DnT v4.1+
body:
Removes the enchantments that are added by [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns)

It only works with Dungeons and Taverns v4.1+

In case you are not a fan of having enchantments in the structures or want to control better where they spawn for a modpack or server
